login.headline: Welcome back.

login.trusted: Trusted by freelancers, remote workers, and workspace owners across Ethiopia.

register.badge: Live workspace data across Addis Ababa
register.headline: Your city’s workspaces,
register.description: Join thousands of freelancers and workspace owners building the future of work in Ethiopia’s capital.
register.feat1Desc: Real-time internet & power status for every space.
register.feat2Desc: Find workspaces near you filtered by your needs.

register.testimonialQuote: Addis Pulse saved me hours every week. I know exactly which café has power before I even leave the house.
